name: Check Coverage After Task
description: After a spec task completes, run the test suite with coverage and alert if coverage drops below threshold

then.prompt: The task just completed. Run the test suite with coverage reporting (e.g. npm test -- --coverage or pytest --cov). Check the coverage output. If overall coverage has dropped below 80%, identify which files lost coverage and suggest adding tests to cover the new or changed code. Report the current coverage percentage in your response.
